fact_nuggets.text: Steadfast (Japanese: Indomitable Heart) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Boosts the Pokemon's Movement Speed when it is cross-eyed or cringing. B S L MD GtI Unavailable S MD When the Pokemon gets the flinch status condition, its Travel Speed goes up! MD RT DX When the Pokemon gets the Flinch condition, its Travel Speed goes up.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Steadfast increases the Pokemon's Speed stat by one stage whenever it flinches . The Speed boost will only apply if the flinching message is displayed. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Steadfast has no effect outside of battle.
In battle [ edit | edit source ] Steadfast increases the Pokemon's Speed stat by one stage whenever it flinches . The Speed boost will only apply if the flinching message is displayed.
Raises Speed one stage upon flinching.
